@@ -5,19 +5,19 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	rspec
-PORTVERSION=	2.8.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.11.0

+		rubygem-rspec-mocks>=2.11.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-rspec-mocks

+		rubygem-rspec-expectations>=2.11.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-rspec-expectations \

 USE_RUBY=	yes
 USE_RAKE=	yes
